---

⚠️ **STOP! DO NOT POST VULNERABILITY DETAILS HERE!**

This is a **PUBLIC REPOSITORY**. Security vulnerabilities should be reported privately.

## 🔐 Security Issue Reporting

**Please DO NOT post vulnerability details in this public issue tracker.**

Instead, please email: **security@company.com**

## 📧 Email Report Template

Include in your email:

```
Subject: Security Vulnerability Report - [Brief Description]

Vulnerability Summary:
[Brief description]

Vulnerability Type:
[SQL Injection / XSS / CSRF / Authentication Bypass / Etc.]

Severity:
[Critical / High / Medium / Low]

Steps to Reproduce:
1. ...
2. ...

Proof of Concept:
[Code or detailed description]

Remediation Suggestions:
[Optional]
```

## Response Timeline

| Severity | Response | Fix Target | Disclosure |
|----------|----------|-----------|------------|
| CRITICAL | 24h | 7 days | 30 days |
| HIGH | 2 days | 14 days | 60 days |
| MEDIUM | 5 days | 30 days | 90 days |
| LOW | 10 days | 60 days | 180 days |

## 📞 Contact

- **Email:** security@company.com
- **PGP Key:** [Available on request]
- **Response Time:** 24 hours (business days)

---

**Thank you for responsibly reporting security vulnerabilities! 🙏**

See [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for full policy.
